title: satyrium yunnanense subsp. yunnanense
intro: Satyrium yunnanense subsp. yunnanense, also known as the Yunnanese satyrium or Yunnan satyrium, is a species of orchid native to southwestern China and northern Myanmar, characterized by its distinctive white flowers with yellow markings. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satyrium yunnanense subsp. yunnanense include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots are sometimes used to make medicinal extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
